title: Falcon Instrument Hub Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Falcon Instrument Hub runtime

wiremap.description: Path to the wiremap file. The wiremap defines the physical connections between instruments and quantum devices, mapping named connections to physical instruments.

quantum-dot-config.description: Path to the quantum dot configuration file. This file describes the quantum device currently loaded and how it connects to the physical hardware.

inst-config.description: Path to the directory containing instrument configuration files. Each file defines the settings for an underlying instrument used by instrument-script-server.

teal-apis.description: Path to the directory containing Teal API definitions. These APIs connect user-generated scripts with executable code.

lua-library-types.description: Path to the Lua library types directory. These libraries need to be injected into the instrument-script-server's Lua global scope before startup via the INSTRUMENT_SCRIPT_SERVER_OPT_LUA_LIB environment variable.

user-measurement-luas.description: Path to the directory containing user measurement Lua scripts. The compiler will select scripts from this directory to issue instructions to the instrument-script-server. The corresponding Go struct for input/output will be selected based on the script.

local-database.description: Path to the root directory for the local HDF5 database. Measurement results will be stored here when required by the measurement type.

nats-url.description: URL for the NATS message broker connection. Used for inter-component communication within the instrument hub.

instrument-server-port.description: Port number on localhost for the instrument-script-server HTTP/RPC embedded server.
